paper_title: Environmental Monitoring and Metabarcoding in Offshore Oil Fields

methods.description: Process for collecting sediment samples from offshore oil fields and extracting genomic DNA for analysis.

steps.description: Sediments with contrasting characteristics from three different offshore oil fields were sampled.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples from specified offshore oil fields

steps.description: 50-100 g of sediment was fixed with 96% ethanol, stored at -20˚C and centrifuged at 6000x g to remove ethanol.
steps.searchable_summary: fix and store sediment samples, then centrifuge to remove ethanol

steps.description: Samples were mixed thoroughly using a sterile metal spatula prior to collecting ten replicates of 0.5 g sediment material for genomic DNA extraction using PowerSoil kits.
steps.searchable_summary: mix samples and extract genomic DNA using PowerSoil kits

methods.description: Processing of demultiplexed flowgram data to correct sequencing artifacts and classify OTUs.

steps.description: Demultiplexed flowgram data was processed using AmpliconNoise and Perseus to correct artifacts from sequencing and PCR.
steps.searchable_summary: process flowgram data to correct sequencing artifacts

steps.description: Denoised sequence datasets were subjected to hierarchical clustering using NDist and Fcluster, resulting in an OTU frequency table.
steps.searchable_summary: perform hierarchical clustering to create OTU frequency table

steps.description: Relative OTU abundances were calculated by dividing dataset specific OTU read abundances with the total number of denoised reads.
Representative OTU sequences were taxonomically classified using CREST with default parameters except for a minimum bitscore of 100.
steps.searchable_summary: classify OTU sequences taxonomically using CREST

steps.description: OTU distribution table was annotated to allow filtering targeting only metazoan or protist OTUs.
steps.searchable_summary: annotate OTU table for filtering metazoan or protist OTUs

methods.description: Statistical procedures to analyze the influence of replication and sequence depth on diversity estimates.

steps.description: Rarefaction analysis, sub-sampling, and calculation of Shannon diversity were performed using R with packages vegan and phyloseq.
steps.searchable_summary: perform rarefaction analysis and calculate Shannon diversity using R

steps.description: Silhouette scores were calculated using the R package cluster.
Repeated random sub-sampling of OTU distribution tables was carried out for each replicate at sequence depth intervals.
steps.searchable_summary: perform repeated sub-sampling of OTU tables

steps.description: Estimate the influence of the number of genomic DNA extraction replicates on alpha-diversity using a repeated sampling scheme.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate influence of DNA extraction replicates on alpha-diversity

steps.description: Simulate the effect of read number on accuracy of community dissimilarity measures.
steps.searchable_summary: simulate effect of read number on community dissimilarity
